folders.name: Introductory
folders.description: Drills for the table tennis player just starting out

drills.name: Forehand Warmup
drills.description: Light topspin to FH, short, 2.1s tempo

drills.name: Backhand Warmup
drills.description: Light topspin to BH, short, 2.1s tempo

drills.name: Forehand 2-Step Footwork
drills.description: Light topspin: center → FH, short, 2.0s tempo

drills.name: Backhand 2-Step Footwork
drills.description: Light topspin: mid-BH → wide BH, short, 2.0s tempo

drills.name: Forehand Push
drills.description: Heavy backspin to FH, short, 2.0s tempo

drills.name: Backhand Push
drills.description: Heavy backspin to BH, short, 2.0s tempo

drills.name: Forehand Push With Footwork
drills.description: Backspin: center → FH, short, 2.1s tempo

drills.name: Backhand Push With Footwork
drills.description: Backspin: center → BH, short, 2.1s tempo

drills.name: Forehand Topspin
drills.description: Medium topspin to FH, deep, 2.1s tempo

drills.name: Backhand Topspin
drills.description: Medium topspin to BH, deep, 2.0s tempo

drills.name: Forehand Topspin With Footwork
drills.description: Topspin: center → FH, deep, 2.0s tempo

drills.name: Backhand Topspin With Footwork
drills.description: Topspin: mid-BH → wide BH, deep, 2.0s tempo

drills.name: Forehand Backspin
drills.description: Light backspin to FH, deep, 2.1s tempo

drills.name: Backhand Backspin
drills.description: Light backspin to BH, deep, 2.1s tempo

drills.name: Forehand Backspin With Footwork
drills.description: Backspin: center → FH, deep, 2.1s tempo

drills.name: Backhand Backspin With Footwork
drills.description: Backspin: center → BH, deep, 2.1s tempo

drills.name: Three Serve Balls
drills.description: 3 short serves FH: topspin → no-spin → backspin, 2.1s

drills.name: Three Balls
drills.description: 3 deep balls: no-spin FH → backspin FH → backspin BH, 2.1s

drills.name: No Spin Forehand
drills.description: No-spin flat ball to FH, deep, 2.1s tempo

drills.name: No Spin Backhand
drills.description: No-spin flat ball to BH, deep, 2.1s tempo

folders.name: Beginner
folders.description: Drills for the table tennis player just starting out

drills.name: Beginner Forehand Warmup
drills.description: No-spin to FH, short, 1.3s tempo

drills.name: Beginner Backhand Warmup
drills.description: No-spin to BH, short, 1.5s tempo

drills.name: Forehand Backhand Footwork
drills.description: No-spin: FH → BH, short, 1.4s tempo

drills.name: Beginner Forehand Random
drills.description: No-spin FH zone, short, random placement, 1.4s

drills.name: Beginner Backhand Random
drills.description: No-spin BH zone, short, random placement, 1.4s

drills.name: Beginner Full Table Random
drills.description: No-spin full table, short, random, 1.2s tempo

drills.name: Serve Then Two Random
drills.description: No-spin serve → 2 deep topspin random, 2.5s rest

drills.name: In-And-Out Footwork
drills.description: 4 balls: short FH → deep FH → short BH → deep BH, 1.2s

drills.name: Three Middle, One to Either Corner
drills.description: No-spin: 3 to center → 1 surprise to corner, 1.2s

drills.name: Forehand Random
drills.description: No-spin FH zone, short, random, medium 1.25s tempo

drills.name: Backhand Random
drills.description: No-spin BH zone, short, random, fast 1.15s tempo

drills.name: Fast Random
drills.description: No-spin full table, short, random, fast 1.0s tempo

drills.name: Short Forehand, Deep Backhand
drills.description: No-spin short FH → topspin deep BH, 2.3s rest

drills.name: Short Backhand, Deep Forehand
drills.description: No-spin short BH → topspin deep FH, 2.3s rest

drills.name: Backhand Rally, Surprise Forehand
drills.description: Serve → 1-5x topspin BH rally → surprise TS FH, 2.2s

drills.name: No-Spin Serves
drills.description: No-spin serve, center, short, 1.2s tempo

drills.name: Serve, Two Speed Balls
drills.description: Serve → fast topspin center → fast topspin center, 2.5s rest

drills.name: Serve, High Forehand, High Backhand
drills.description: No-spin serve → high topspin FH → high topspin BH

drills.name: Serve, Then Speed
drills.description: BS serve → fast topspin FH → center → BH, 2.1s rest

drills.name: Forehand Game Situation
drills.description: BS serve FH → deep backspin FH → deep topspin FH

drills.name: Backhand Game Situation
drills.description: BS serve BH → deep backspin BH → deep topspin BH

drills.name: Short Serve Then 10 Balls
drills.description: Short serve → 10 topspin random, 1.25s, 2.8s rest

drills.name: No Spin, Topspin
drills.description: No-spin center → heavy topspin center, 1.6s tempo

drills.name: Left Sidespin Serve Return
drills.description: Topspin + R-sidespin, center, medium depth, 1.65s

drills.name: Right Sidespin Serve Return
drills.description: Topspin + L-sidespin, center, medium depth, 1.65s

drills.name: No-Spin Serve Return
drills.description: No-spin serve, center, short, 1.65s tempo

drills.name: Topspin Serve Return
drills.description: Heavy topspin, center, short, 1.6s tempo

drills.name: Left Sidespin Serve Anywhere
drills.description: Heavy topspin + R-sidespin, center, random depth, 1.65s

drills.name: Right Sidespin Serve Anywhere
drills.description: Heavy topspin + L-sidespin, center, random depth, 1.65s

drills.name: Left Sidespin Topspin Serve
drills.description: Heavy topspin + slight R-sidespin, center, short, 1.55s

drills.name: Right Sidespin Topspin Serve
drills.description: Heavy topspin + slight L-sidespin, center, short, 1.55s

drills.name: Backspin, Topspin
drills.description: BS short center → 5x topspin deep random, 2.3s rest

folders.name: Intermediate
folders.description: Drills for the intermediate table tennis player

drills.name: Intermediate Forehand Warmup
drills.description: Topspin FH zone, deep, random placement, 0.95s tempo

drills.name: Intermediate Backhand Warmup
drills.description: Topspin BH, deep, fast 0.93s tempo

drills.name: Two Backhands, Two Forehands
drills.description: Topspin: BH → BH → FH → FH, deep, 0.98s tempo

drills.name: Forehand, Middle
drills.description: Topspin: FH → center, deep, 0.98s tempo

drills.name: Backhand, Middle
drills.description: Topspin: BH → center, deep, 0.98s tempo

drills.name: Backhand, Middle, Backhand, Forehand
drills.description: Topspin: BH → mid → BH → FH, deep, 0.98s

drills.name: One or Two Backhands, One or Two Forehands
drills.description: Topspin: 1-2 BH → 1-2 FH, deep, semi-random, 0.98s

drills.name: Middle, Either Corner
drills.description: Topspin: center → random corner, deep, 0.98s tempo

drills.name: Wide Faulkenberg
drills.description: Topspin: BH → wide BH → wide FH, deep, 1.0-1.4s

drills.name: Forehand Random
drills.description: Topspin FH zone, deep, random placement, 0.95s tempo

drills.name: Backhand Random
drills.description: Topspin BH zone, deep, random placement, 0.95s tempo

drills.name: Random
drills.description: Topspin full table, deep, random, fast 0.93s tempo

drills.name: Short Forehand, Deep Backhand
drills.description: BS short FH → topspin deep BH (x2), 2.4s rest

drills.name: Serve Then Footwork
drills.description: BS serve BH → topspin FH → mid → BH, 2.4s rest

drills.name: Three Ball Drill
drills.description: BS serve mid → heavy BS random → fast TS mid, 2.4s rest

drills.name: Three Ball Random
drills.description: BS short random → BS deep random → TS deep random, 2.4s

drills.name: Twelve Ball Rally
drills.description: BS serve → BS push → 10x fast topspin random, 2.4s rest

drills.name: No Spin, Topspin, High Ball
drills.description: No-spin short → fast topspin deep → high lob FH, 3.0s

drills.name: Left Sidespin Then Rally
drills.description: L-SS BS short → 3-5x fast topspin BH, 3.0s rest

drills.name: Serve Then Backhand Random
drills.description: R-SS BS short → 10x fast topspin BH random, 3.0s rest

drills.name: Serve Then Speed
drills.description: Heavy TS serve → fast topspin random (x5), 2.9s rest

drills.name: High Spins
drills.description: BS serve → high BS → high TS → high BS → high TS, 2.9s

drills.name: High Backhand, High Forehand
drills.description: High topspin: BH → FH, lob height, 1.31s tempo

drills.name: High Spins Smashing
drills.description: High topspin FH → high backspin FH, lob height, 1.41s

drills.name: Forehand Speed
drills.description: Fast topspin FH zone, deep, random, 0.75s tempo

drills.name: Backhand Speed
drills.description: Fast topspin BH zone, deep, random, 0.75s tempo

drills.name: Left Sidespin Topspin Serve
drills.description: Topspin + slight R-sidespin, center, medium, 1.4s

drills.name: Right Sidespin Topspin Serve
drills.description: Topspin + slight L-sidespin, center, medium, 1.4s

drills.description: Heavy BS + L-sidespin, center, short, 1.45s tempo

drills.name: Right Sidespin Backspin Serve
drills.description: Heavy BS + R-sidespin, center, short, 1.45s tempo

drills.name: Smash, Topspin, Lob
drills.description: Fast flat FH → heavy topspin FH → lob FH, 1.32s

drills.name: Spinny Serves
drills.description: Very heavy BS, center, short, random osc, 1.77s tempo

folders.name: Advanced

drills.name: Advanced Forehand Warmup
drills.description: Fast topspin FH zone, deep, random, 0.78s tempo

drills.name: Advanced Backhand Warmup
drills.description: Fast topspin BH, deep, random, 0.78s tempo

drills.description: Fast TS: FH → mid → BH, deep, random zones, 0.8s

drills.description: Fast TS: 1-2 FH → 1-2 BH, deep, semi-random, 0.87s

drills.description: Fast TS: 1-2 BH → 1-2 mid, deep, semi-random, 0.87s

drills.description: Fast topspin: center → random, deep, 0.87s tempo

drills.description: Medium topspin, full table, deep, random, 0.91s tempo

drills.description: Heavy topspin, full table, random all, fast 0.8s tempo

drills.description: BS-SS serve → heavy BS deep → topspin deep, 2.9s rest

drills.description: No-spin serve → fast TS BH → fast TS FH, 2.5s rest

drills.description: L-SS BS serve → fast topspin, very fast 0.95-1.15s

drills.description: L-SS BS serve → 1-10x topspin rally random, 3.1s rest

drills.description: No-spin serve → fast topspin random, 2.7s rest

drills.description: 1-4x BS short → BS deep → TS BH → fast TS FH, 2.5s rest

folders.name: 30-Day Program
folders.description: Drills for the 30-Day Challenge training program

drills.name: BH Block Slow
drills.description: Slow topspin to backhand for block technique work

drills.name: BH Block Medium
drills.description: Medium speed topspin to backhand for block progression

drills.name: BH Block Fast
drills.description: Fast topspin to backhand for reaction block training

drills.name: FH-BH Block
drills.description: Alternating topspin to forehand and backhand for block footwork

drills.name: Short Backspin FH Flick
drills.description: Short backspin to forehand for strawberry flick practice

drills.name: Short Backspin BH Flick
drills.description: Short backspin to backhand for banana flick practice

drills.name: Short No-Spin FH
drills.description: Short no-spin ball to forehand for flick practice

drills.name: Short No-Spin BH
drills.description: Short no-spin ball to backhand for flick practice

drills.name: Short Sidespin L BH
drills.description: Short left sidespin to backhand for banana flick with spin read

drills.name: Short Sidespin R FH
drills.description: Short right sidespin to forehand for strawberry flick with spin read

drills.name: Mixed Short Serves
drills.description: Alternating backspin and no-spin short serves for read and react

drills.name: BH Topspin Consistency
drills.description: Steady medium topspin to backhand for rally consistency

drills.name: Backspin Open Attack
drills.description: Heavy backspin to center for opening topspin attack practice

drills.name: BH Flick Then Rally
drills.description: Short backspin then topspin rally to backhand — flick into rally

drills.name: FH Flick Then Rally
drills.description: Short backspin then topspin rally to forehand — flick into rally

drills.name: Quick Reaction Random
drills.description: Fast topspin balls with random placement for reaction training

drills.name: Sidespin Serve Rally
drills.description: Sidespin serve followed by topspin rally — serve receive into attack

drills.name: Mixed Spin Serves
drills.description: Backspin, no-spin, topspin serves in rotation for spin read training

drills.name: Game Pattern Serve-Flick-Rally
drills.description: Short serve → flick → 3 topspins — full game sequence simulation

drills.name: Sidespin Mixed LR
drills.description: Alternating left and right sidespin serves for spin read practice

drills.name: FH Topspin vs No-Spin
drills.description: No-spin ball to forehand — practice opening topspin on flat ball

drills.name: BH Topspin vs No-Spin
drills.description: No-spin ball to backhand — practice opening topspin on flat ball

drills.name: FH Topspin vs Backspin
drills.description: Backspin ball to forehand — practice opening topspin on backspin

drills.name: BH Topspin vs Backspin
drills.description: Backspin ball to backhand — practice opening topspin on backspin

drills.name: FH Counter-Topspin
drills.description: Topspin ball to forehand — practice counter-topspin over the table

drills.name: BH Counter-Topspin
drills.description: Topspin ball to backhand — practice counter-topspin over the table

drills.name: FH-BH Topspin Alternating
drills.description: Alternating topspin to forehand and backhand for transition practice

drills.name: Mixed Spin FH Open
drills.description: No-spin → backspin → topspin to forehand — read spin and react

drills.name: In-Out FH Attack
drills.description: Chinese pattern: short backspin → deep topspin to FH — in-and-out footwork

drills.name: In-Out BH Attack
drills.description: Chinese pattern: short backspin → deep topspin to BH — in-and-out footwork

drills.name: 3rd Ball FH
drills.description: Chinese 3rd ball: serve → push to FH → FH topspin attack

drills.name: 3rd Ball BH
drills.description: Chinese 3rd ball: serve → push to BH → BH topspin attack

drills.name: 4th Ball Counter FH
drills.description: Chinese 4th ball: short → topspin → block FH → FH counter-topspin

drills.name: 4th Ball Counter BH
drills.description: Chinese 4th ball: short → topspin → block BH → BH counter-topspin

drills.name: FH Topspin Everywhere
drills.description: Chinese pattern: FH topspin across full table with wide random placement

drills.name: Serve-Flick-Counter
drills.description: Chinese pattern: short serve → flick → fast counter — 3 ball game sequence

drills.name: BH Flick + 2 Rally
drills.description: Short backspin → banana flick → 2 topspin rally balls to BH — practice flick into sustained rally

drills.name: FH Flick + 2 Rally
drills.description: Short backspin → strawberry flick → 2 topspin rally balls to FH — practice flick into sustained rally

drills.name: BH Flick + Counter + Finish
drills.description: Chinese pattern: short → banana flick → fast counter → finish to BH — 3rd/4th ball attack

drills.name: FH Flick + Counter + Finish
drills.description: Chinese pattern: short → strawberry flick → fast counter → finish to FH — 3rd/4th ball attack

drills.name: BH Flick → Cross FH
drills.description: Short backspin to BH → flick → opponent responds cross-court to FH — placement change training

drills.name: FH Flick → Cross BH
drills.description: Short backspin to FH → flick → opponent responds cross-court to BH — placement change training

drills.name: Kicker Serve FH
drills.description: Fast topspin kicker to forehand — bounces high at end of table

drills.name: Kicker Serve BH
drills.description: Fast topspin kicker to backhand — bounces high at end of table

drills.name: Kicker Sidespin L
drills.description: Kicker serve with left sidespin — bounces high with curve

drills.name: Kicker Sidespin R
drills.description: Kicker serve with right sidespin — bounces high with curve

drills.name: Kicker Backspin
drills.description: Heavy backspin kicker — fast, deep, deceptive backspin that bounces long

drills.name: Short Sidespin-Topspin L
drills.description: Short serve with left sidespin + slight topspin — tricky spin read

drills.name: Short Sidespin-Topspin R
drills.description: Short serve with right sidespin + slight topspin — tricky spin read

drills.name: Long Sidespin-Backspin L
drills.description: Deep serve with left sidespin + heavy backspin — pendulum style

drills.name: Long Sidespin-Backspin R
drills.description: Deep serve with right sidespin + heavy backspin — reverse pendulum style

drills.name: Short Pendulum L
drills.description: Short left pendulum serve — sidespin + backspin, classic Chinese serve

drills.name: Short Reverse Pendulum R
drills.description: Short right reverse-pendulum serve — sidespin + backspin
